item.title: GSM Mobile SMS Gateways Mac [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: GSM Mobile SMS Gateways Mac [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: pctomobilesms1
item.itunes:summary:
GSM Mobile SMS Gateways Mac
(Chat & Messenging)
Software delivers alert/reminder messages. SMS Gateways tool sends professional message from Apple PC via using GSM mobile. GSM Mobile SMS Gateways Mac Software is easily available at www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com to compose infinite number of text messages and deliver to multiple phonebooks contact number.www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com offers GSM Mobile SMS Gateways Mac Software broadcasts single text messages to targeted audience from Apple laptop via connecting GSM phone devices without requiring any internet connection. Text SMS program delivers personalized messages to your friends, relatives, family member and other special member.

[read more]

item.title: claudemods ArchIso Creator [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: claudemods ArchIso Creator [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
claudemods ArchIso Creator
(Utilities)

claudemods ArchIso Creator v1.0
Sailing the 7 seas like Penguin's Eggs Remastersys, Refracta, Systemback and father Knoppix!

i made this for creating Arch .iso for my distributions
since its getting alot harder with things breaking these days
big recommendation to Penguin's Eggs
https://github.com/pieroproietti/penguins-eggs i used it before making this

you should be able to copy a dwarfs to the iso no problem
im yet to test this with my dwarfs i converted from sqaushfs
i will also be adding this into this application for those who want to convert
i managed to skim 400mb off a squashfs with compression 7 with dwarfs



installation
like most my applications you need qt 6.7.2 or above installed
downloaded .zip and .desktop needed
extract .zip to /opt
run .desktop

steps
1: create squashfs/dwarfs "currently not added"
2: select sqaushfs/dwarfs + edit boot name + iso name ect....
3: create an iso in the applications directory e.g /opt/claudemods-ArchIso-Creator/



v1.0 17/09/2024
current functions
select squashfs or dwarfs
change boot menu name
change .iso name to what you want
create a bootable Arch iso



v1.01 not released yet
things being currently added before testing
i have a squashfs creator script i need to test again before adding
sqaushfs to dwarfs convertor i already have a working script
i want to fix the grub artwork selected for now please wait

[read more]
item.description:
claudemods ArchIso Creator
(Utilities)

claudemods ArchIso Creator v1.0
Sailing the 7 seas like Penguin's Eggs Remastersys, Refracta, Systemback and father Knoppix!

i made this for creating Arch .iso for my distributions
since its getting alot harder with things breaking these days
big recommendation to Penguin's Eggs
https://github.com/pieroproietti/penguins-eggs i used it before making this

you should be able to copy a dwarfs to the iso no problem
im yet to test this with my dwarfs i converted from sqaushfs
i will also be adding this into this application for those who want to convert
i managed to skim 400mb off a squashfs with compression 7 with dwarfs



installation
like most my applications you need qt 6.7.2 or above installed
downloaded .zip and .desktop needed
extract .zip to /opt
run .desktop

steps
1: create squashfs/dwarfs "currently not added"
2: select sqaushfs/dwarfs + edit boot name + iso name ect....
3: create an iso in the applications directory e.g /opt/claudemods-ArchIso-Creator/



v1.0 17/09/2024
current functions
select squashfs or dwarfs
change boot menu name
change .iso name to what you want
create a bootable Arch iso



v1.01 not released yet
things being currently added before testing
i have a squashfs creator script i need to test again before adding
sqaushfs to dwarfs convertor i already have a working script
i want to fix the grub artwork selected for now please wait

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
claudemods ArchIso Creator
(Utilities)

claudemods ArchIso Creator v1.0
Sailing the 7 seas like Penguin's Eggs Remastersys, Refracta, Systemback and father Knoppix!

i made this for creating Arch .iso for my distributions
since its getting alot harder with things breaking these days
big recommendation to Penguin's Eggs
https://github.com/pieroproietti/penguins-eggs i used it before making this

you should be able to copy a dwarfs to the iso no problem
im yet to test this with my dwarfs i converted from sqaushfs
i will also be adding this into this application for those who want to convert
i managed to skim 400mb off a squashfs with compression 7 with dwarfs



installation
like most my applications you need qt 6.7.2 or above installed
downloaded .zip and .desktop needed
extract .zip to /opt
run .desktop

steps
1: create squashfs/dwarfs "currently not added"
2: select sqaushfs/dwarfs + edit boot name + iso name ect....
3: create an iso in the applications directory e.g /opt/claudemods-ArchIso-Creator/



v1.0 17/09/2024
current functions
select squashfs or dwarfs
change boot menu name
change .iso name to what you want
create a bootable Arch iso



v1.01 not released yet
things being currently added before testing
i have a squashfs creator script i need to test again before adding
sqaushfs to dwarfs convertor i already have a working script
i want to fix the grub artwork selected for now please wait

[read more]

item.title: PC to Mobile Bulk SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: PC to Mobile Bulk SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: pctomobilesms1
item.itunes:summary:
PC to Mobile Bulk SMS Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Text message sender tool forward new alert. Computer to mobile messaging application broadcast mass messages. PC to Mobile Bulk SMS Software application is available on company home page www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com that is helpful to promote business product marketing. PC to Mobile Bulk SMS Software is downloaded from www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com to transmit interview notification, news and price alert without any internet connection. SMS sender program provides comprehensive way to broadcast product promotion date. Professional SMS sender program is offered by company on www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com website which is helpful to communicate with business partner on time you are in meeting with client. PC to Mobile Bulk SMS Software is developed with innovative technology for creating standard message and sends on international network.

[read more]

item.title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: divverent
item.itunes:summary:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.description:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.

item.title: Android Bulk SMS Mac [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Android Bulk SMS Mac [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: pctomobilesms1
item.itunes:summary:
Android Bulk SMS Mac
(Chat & Messenging)
Free android mobile message sending tool. Android Bulk SMS Mac tool provides option to save sent messages as temples on PC. Well compatible Android Bulk SMS Mac program allows user to quickly dispatch limitless text messages to list of selected contact number without requiring any internet connection on computer system. Don’t have any idea about how broadcast several text messages simultaneously at any worldwide? Download highly economical and effective Android Bulk SMS Mac that provides simplified way to deliver reminders, notifications, invitation, greeting, personalized SMS etc. from apple PC with use of android mobile phone device.

[read more]

item.itunes:author: barcodelabeldesign1
item.itunes:summary:
Barcode Label Design
(Office Apps)
Full version of Barcode Label Design application is available at website www.barcodelabeldesign.com to create business standard barcode ribbons, stickers, bands, logos etc for inventory, retails, postal, book and production industry. Extraordinary barcode maker tool save designed barcode stickers in different image file formats.

item.title: Mobile Bulk SMS Gateway [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Mobile Bulk SMS Gateway [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: pctomobilesms1
item.itunes:summary:
Mobile Bulk SMS Gateway
(Chat & Messenging)
Bulk SMS Sending Utility deliver news alerts. Mobile Bulk SMS Gateway program is capable to deliver unlimited text messages. Download free Mobile Bulk SMS Gateway application from www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com that is able to deliver various types of messages like business promotion, news alerts, job alerts, reminders, greeting and more others. Do you want to deliver job interview messages on multiple jobs seekers mobile phones? Highly technical Mobile Bulk SMS Gateway program is simply downloaded from www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com provides option to control and manage load of bulk numbers of messages broadcasting on national and international mobile phones. How to broadcast free SMS messages from GSM technology based mobile cell phone? Professional Mobile Bulk SMS Gateway application is easily downloaded from www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com facilitates to deliver and composed thousands of numbers of messages across the world without any internet connection and SMS gateway services.

[read more]

item.title: Mobile SMS Gateways [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Mobile SMS Gateways [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: pctomobilesms1
item.itunes:summary:
Mobile SMS Gateways
(Chat & Messenging)
Well-designed group SMS messaging tool. Mobile SMS Gateways program promotes business products by sending mass SMS. Powerful and affordable Mobile SMS Gateways application offers interactive GUI interface to support common users in sending of more than thousand messages without requirement of any specific SMS gateway or internet service. Free demo version of bulk messages transmitting program is useful to understand its working capabilities for quick broadcasting of event notifications all over world by connecting multiple GSM phones with desktop or laptop machine. Mobile SMS Gateways utility is helpful for users to advertise their business services by broadcasting bulk text SMS from computer to multiple persons.

[read more]

Barcode Label Design Software
(Office Apps)
Visit www.barcodelabeldesign.com website to install Barcode Labels Design Software that is helpful for designing stylish coupons, tags, labels, and assets by using flexible printing settings without any difficulty. Barcode maker utility is capable to create multiple tags with advance data set series feature.
